title: Implementation step ledger — institutional-memory role modules (PR #126)
note: ADVISORY, commit-anchored record of every implementation step in this delivery: what was built, the verification claimed in the commit log, and the CI outcome at each push head. The PRIMARY log is git history + the PR's per-commit CI checks; this record makes the lineage navigable in-repo, applying the Argo evidence discipline to the layer's own construction. Every step is re-verifiable: check out any commit and run its named oracles.

steps.subject: Daedalus role module (contracts probed against code)
steps.verification_logged: verify-contracts 59/59; comprehension gate correct GRANTED / hallucinating DENIED; build-gate npm test green

steps.subject: chore: git-ignore .claude/ session artifacts
steps.verification_logged: hygiene only — no oracle claims; corrects an accidental gitlink staged by the prior commit (caught and amended before push)

steps.subject: TELOS role module + restore dangling authz evidence (authz-006/007/008 run dirs recovered from origin branches)
steps.verification_logged: verify-contracts 91/91; gate correct 19/19 GRANTED / hallucinating DENIED

steps.subject: Argo role module (entry ritual EXECUTED by the verifier, not paraphrased)
Agentic navigation: route-by-intent table + machine memory-dir index
steps.verification_logged: full battery: verify-contracts 114/114; comprehension gate 8/8 (4 modules x 2 readers); clotho + build-gate npm test green

steps.subject: Loadout capability module: seat-backend contracts (no-shadow probed) + per-task optimization reviews (4b/5/6/7)
steps.verification_logged: verify-contracts 144/144; loadout readers GRANTED/DENIED; build-gate npm test green

steps.subject: Env-surface contract (closed ambient context, 112 reads / 99 files) + direct advisory-absence gate test + CI institutional-memory job
steps.verification_logged: verify-contracts 149/149; mutation test 3/3 falsifications caught then reverted clean; the new advisory test surfaced and pinned the 'No Grok advisory packet present.' warning; build-gate npm test green
steps.ci: 18/18 checks success — the count grows here because this commit ADDED the institutional-memory CI job, which passed on its first ubuntu run

steps.subject: Seat-keyed model/prompt data: seats.json + prompts.json separated from script; prompts enhanced per purpose + model strength
steps.verification_logged: verify-contracts 175/175; seat-name guard mutation-tested (hardcoded 'claude' fails two checks); build-gate + saas-forge npm test green

verification_growth: 29 (base) -> 59 -> 91 -> 114 -> 144 -> 149 -> 175 verifier checks — each step added its own oracles in the same commit as its claims

reverify.head: node docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs   (continuous: the institutional-memory CI job runs this on every push/PR)
reverify.any_step: git checkout <commit> && node docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs && cd build-gate && npm test   (steps 1-6 predate the CI job; their claims re-verify locally and are covered cumulatively by the next push head's CI)
reverify.ci_log: https://github.com/dsmcewan/TELOS/pull/126/checks (per-commit check runs are the machine log)
